import bpy
import math

bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='SELECT')
bpy.ops.object.delete(use_global=False)

# --- Mug Body ---
# Cylinder parameters: Radius 0.5, Height 1.0
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_cylinder_add(vertices=32, radius=0.5, depth=1.0, location=(0, 0, 0.5))
body = bpy.context.active_object
body.name = "MugBody"

# --- Handle ---
# Torus parameters: Major radius 0.3, Minor radius 0.06
# We place it slightly offset from the body's center.
bpy.ops.mesh.primitive_torus_add(major_radius=0.3, minor_radius=0.06,
    major_segments=24, minor_segments=12, location=(0.6, 0, 0.5))
handle = bpy.context.active_object
handle.name = "MugHandle"

# --- Joining Objects ---
# Select body first, then handle
bpy.ops.object.select_all(action='DESELECT')
body.select_set(True)
handle.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = body

# Join
bpy.ops.object.join()
mug = bpy.context.active_object
mug.name = "CoffeeMug"

# --- Finalization ---
# Hard surface object, so shade flat
bpy.ops.object.shade_flat()
